rationale: Phase 7 §8 W0 one-shot rehash per architect-ratified decision #3. New deps: axum 0.7, tower-http 0.5, tokio-tungstenite 0.21 — all optional, behind [features.web]. New bin: turingos_web (path src/bin/turingos_web.rs, required-features = ["web"]). No Class 4 surface touched. genesis_payload.toml [trust_root] entries for Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock updated in lockstep; no other Trust Root entries modified.
integration_note: W0 sonnet executor's worktree harness defaulted to origin/HEAD (main @ 88fa1f66) instead of codex/tisr-phase7-web HEAD (@ 1cab5c78), so the sonnet agent's rehash hashes were computed against the wrong base. Orchestrator (Haiku 4.5) re-applied the W0 spec verbatim onto codex/tisr-phase7-web @ 1cab5c78 (Phase 6.1 SHIP + macOS portability commit cdd2ad7e inherited): copied W0's NEW files unchanged (src/web/**, src/bin/turingos_web.rs, frontend/**, tests/cli_web_smoke.rs, this evidence dir), merged W0's Cargo.toml additions onto Phase 7's Cargo.toml content, regenerated Cargo.lock via cargo build --features web, and recomputed sha256 against the correct base. File contents for non-Cargo/non-genesis paths are byte-identical to W0 worktree commit df7938ea.
